prompt: vibedgames is agent-driven — read AGENTS.md first. Local stack: `pnpm install`, copy both env templates (`.env.example` -> `.env` and `apps/web/.dev.vars.example` -> `apps/web/.dev.vars`), run `pnpm dev:web` once so the Miniflare D1 exists, then `pnpm db:local`. Seeded browser login: user@vibedgames.com / password123 (admin@vibedgames.com for admin). Gate every change with `pnpm verify`. Never run `wrangler deploy`, `pnpm db:push` or `pnpm db:push-remote` — those hit production. `vg deploy` against `http://localhost:5173` is safe: uploads proxy into the local Miniflare R2 bucket. `http://127.0.0.1:5173` is not — that host skips the proxy and writes to production R2.
